requirement_source: PRD: orvex-studio-contracts (jwF4VLHfNs, draft) + Architecture: orvex-studio-contracts (o2waDNw3ix, canonical) — FR/NFR id scheme is FR-Cn / NFR-Cn; architecture adds ADR-style A-* decisions + SE-Arch tightening T1-T7 (incl. ratified ADR-0008 change-authority).

epics.title: [EPIC] contracts: Repo foundation, validation CI & versioning keystones

stories.title: [contracts] A-LAYOUT directory scaffold + README layout-table sync
[contracts] Self-validation CI (validate.yaml): OpenAPI/JSON-Schema lint + cross-ref + version-required + $id/servers hygiene
[contracts] SEAMS.md seam inventory + referenced-but-unpinned build-blocking check
[contracts] Versioning & change policy: VERSION/CHANGELOG/semver tags/x-status + first v0.1.0 tag
[contracts] Authored-not-generated provenance guard: PR-template attestation + generator-signature lint
[contracts] Shared _components: error envelope, pagination, bearer + workload-identity auth schemes
[contracts] engine-primitives.yaml operations (blocks/ACL/export/api-key/exchange/provision/F-QUOTA)
[contracts] knowledge-query.yaml + knowledge-projection.yaml
[contracts] identity.yaml incl. issuer-registry/JWKS-mirror (x-status: draft)
[contracts] internal-tier OpenAPI: keyword-upsert + rebuild step-APIs (workload-identity)
[contracts] wiki-api.yaml: verb grammar + receipts + CAS + spec-gate transport + comment/attachment + QUOTA passthrough
[contracts] ai.yaml: cited-ask/RAG + K5 answer schema + spend-cap read/enforce
[contracts] billing.yaml + plan/entitlements JSON schemas (plans/entitlements SoR)
[contracts] ADR-0015 ruling 7b — engine-primitives.yaml workspace-existence/HEAD read op (closes the orphan-sweep contract hole)

epics.title: [EPIC] contracts: Event catalog, envelope profiles & SSE wire contract

stories.title: [contracts] CloudEvent type catalog (events/catalog.yaml)
[contracts] Envelope profiles PROFILES.md + type↔frame mapping table
[contracts] Publisher obligations: version-carry + batch fan-out rule
[contracts] Event payload schemas (version required, additionalProperties:false)
[contracts] SSE wire contract WIRE.md + EVENTS.md authority flip
[contracts] SSE recorded-risk register RISKS.md
[contracts] ADR-0035 §1/§6 — TS CloudEvent envelope + per-type payload codegen (json-schema-to-typescript + ajv) — the second codegen toolchain

epics.title: [EPIC] contracts: Shared identity schemas, source registry & golden/DfM fixtures

stories.title: [contracts] identity schemas: principal/token-scope/roles/token-claims + conformance vectors
[contracts] source-adapter registry SCHEMA.yaml + wiki.yaml
[contracts] golden markdown/text_repr fixture pairs
[contracts] DfM round-trip fixtures + pkg/dfm Go API surface + opaque-node handle shape

epics.title: [EPIC] contracts: Error/exit-code vocabulary & MCP REST-gap ledger

stories.title: [contracts] Frozen errorCode + CLI exit-code vocabulary (errors/*.yaml)
[contracts] MCP REST-gap ledger (mcp/rest-gap-ledger.yaml)

epics.title: [EPIC] contracts: Gates — divergence, drift, AGPL-import & parity

stories.title: [contracts] AGPL-import guard config (gates/agpl-import/)
[contracts] FR-30 divergence-gate config (gates/allowlist/baseline/weighting)
[contracts] Contract-drift gates: served-OpenAPI diff + emitted-event + fixture reproduction + SSE conformance
[contracts] Engine-side FR-31 harness defs: api-key parity + crash-injection/replay-completeness
[contracts] DfM parity gate definition (Go pkg/dfm + engine TS, fixture-mediated)
[contracts] ADR-0004 #2 — cell-lint-allow trailer MUST carry a non-empty reason; empty/missing fails the gate (fix the trailer matcher + test)
[contracts] obs/CONVENTIONS.md family service-name + OTel attribute conventions
[contracts] Change-authority governance: ADR-0008 lane classifier + additive-fast-track review SLA
